zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas De Latham於大約1245年出生在英國英格蘭藍卡爾時，他的父親Robert de Lathom48歲，母親Lady Amicia de Alfreton46歲。他於1278年8月24日與Samantha Maryanne Reeves在英國倫敦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas De Latham于大约1245年出生在英国英格兰藍卡爾时，他的父亲Robert de Lathom48岁，母亲Lady Amicia de Alfreton46岁。他于1278年8月24日与Samantha Maryanne Reeves在英国倫敦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Latham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Lathom in Lancashire, or occasionally perhaps from Laytham in Yorkshire. The placenames mean ‘at the barns’, from hlǫthum, the dative plural form of Old Norse hlatha ‘barn, store house’.

variants.name: Laden
meanings: German: from a shortened form of Ladengast ‘invite the guest’, a nickname for an innkeeper.
German: from von der Laden, a nickname for a joiner or for the keeper of a shrine or the chest of a guild, from Middle Low German lade ‘chest’.

variants.name: Lathan
meanings: English (mainly northeastern counties): variant of   Latham  .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas De Latham was born about 1245, in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert de Lathom, was 48 and his mother, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, was 46. He married Samantha Maryanne Reeves on 24 August 1278, in London, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas De Latham est né environ 1245, à Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert de Lathom, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Samantha Maryanne Reeves le 24 août 1278, à Londres, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas De Latham um 1245 in Lancashire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert de Lathom 48 und seine Mutter Lady Amicia de Alfreton 46. Er hat am 24. August 1278 in London, England Samantha Maryanne Reeves geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Latham è nato il circa 1245 nel Lancashire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert de Lathom, aveva 48 anni e il suo madre, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Samantha Maryanne Reeves il 24 agosto 1278, nel London, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas De Lathamが約1245年にイギリスイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Robert de Lathomは48歳，母Lady Amicia de Alfretonは46歳であった。1278年8月24日にイギリスロンドンでSamantha Maryanne Reevesと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas De Latham(이)가 대략 1245년 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert de Lathom(은)는 48세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Amicia de Alfreton(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1278년 8월 24일 영국 런던에서 Samantha Maryanne Reeves(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas De Latham nasceu aproximadamente 1245, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert de Lathom, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Samantha Maryanne Reeves em 24 de agosto de 1278, em London, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas De Latham родился около 1245 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert de Lathom было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Amicia de Alfreton, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Samantha Maryanne Reeves 24 августа 1278 г. в местности Лондон, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas De Latham nació aproximadamente 1245, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert de Lathom, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Lady Amicia de Alfreton, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Samantha Maryanne Reeves el 24 de agosto de 1278, en London, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
